institution.name: SUNY College of Technology at Delhi

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at SUNY College of Technology at Delhi fell 44% between 2021 and 2024 (41.0% → 23.2%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at SUNY College of Technology at Delhi rose 19% between 2006 and 2009 ($5.3k → $6.4k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at SUNY College of Technology at Delhi fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (65.9% → 56.9%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at SUNY College of Technology at Delhi fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.0% → 0.0%).
